floor_history.headline: recon: HEAD form floor=0 but uses judge-rejected empty-if; three pure-C alternate spellings identified, all untested

frontier.hypothesis: H1 (primary, saved in candidate.c): `if (!(D_800A38F8 > D_800A37A0)) { LOOPS }` — invert to non-empty-body form; jump.c inverts branch sense identically
frontier.mechanism: GCC 2.7.2 jump.c invert_jump on if-then-goto skeleton; sltu operand order preserved because comparison expression is identical (only enclosing sense negated); i=0 remains sole scheduling candidate for loop1 exit delay slot
frontier.next_probe: Apply candidate.c to src/code6cac.c:1611-1636; sandbox --disable all; if score=0, candidate-ready; if score>0, inspect .greg/.sched dumps in tmp/grind/camera_SetMatrix_8001DBE4/s2/ to see which insn diverged

frontier.hypothesis: H2 (fallback if H1 fails on sltu direction): `if (D_800A38F8 <= D_800A37A0) { LOOPS }` — semantically equivalent to H1 but written with <= operator; may cause GCC to swap sltu operands (produce `sltu v0, v1, v0`+beqz instead of `sltu v0, v0, v1`+bnez)
frontier.mechanism: GCC lowering of `a <= b` on unsigned integers often emits `sltu tmp, b, a; beqz tmp` — the OPPOSITE operand order and branch sense from target. If H1 succeeds this is moot; if H1 fails on branch-sense it is a controlled variant to isolate whether the issue is expression form vs enclosing sense
frontier.next_probe: Only if H1 shows a divergence — write variant.c with `<=` form and sandbox; compare .s output vs H1's .s to localise the diff

frontier.hypothesis: H3 (structural fallback): early-return the tail — `if (!(D_800A38F8 > D_800A37A0)) { LOOPS; } func_8003AAB0(); gpu_InitDisplay(); gpu_DisableDisplay();` unchanged (this IS H1). No structurally different pure-C form is compatible with the target's skip-to-tail control flow — the tail is unconditional, so an inversion-return-refactor would break the shape.
frontier.mechanism: Control flow shape is fixed by target: outer bne-to-return + inner bnez-to-common-tail. There is no room for early-return inside the loop-guarded region without changing the skip target from .L8001DC84 (tail) to .L8001DC9C (fn exit).
frontier.next_probe: This is a NEGATIVE frontier entry — do NOT attempt an early-return-tail refactor; it will regress the skip target. Included so future sessions do not rediscover this as a lever.

judge_constraints: REGRESSION DIAGNOSIS (completion bar: match must land WITHOUT this construct family): Empty if-body construct (line 1618, code6cac.c) fails tests 1+2 and matches the 'empty-body if(cond){} dead-read' forbidden family. Worker should rewrite to 'if (!(D_800A38F8 > D_800A37A0)) { ... }' (or '<=' form) and run verify-oracle to confirm equivalence — if oracle passes the form was benign style; if it fails it was genuinely codegen-dependent and requires deeper analysis.  (committed code flagged by the re-audit patrol; review and re-do in pure C if confirmed. The byte-correct construct stays on main until a clean replacement lands.)
